title: Segmentation fault in isAuxiliaryVtabOperator
poc: CREATE TABLE v0(v3, v1 AS(v1) UNIQUE);
CREATE TABLE v5(v6 UNIQUE, v7 UNIQUE);
CREATE VIEW v8(v9) AS SELECT coalesce(v3, v1) FROM v0 WHERE v1 IN('MED BOX');
SELECT *FROM v8 JOIN v5 WHERE 0 > v7 AND v9 OR v6 = 's%';
key_bug_features: SELECT statement with JOIN and complex conditions
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t1(a INTEGER, b TEXT, c REAL, d BLOB);
CREATE TABLE t2(x INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, y TEXT NOT NULL, z REAL DEFAULT 0.0);
INSERT INTO t1(a, b, c, d) VALUES(1, 'test', 3.14, X'0001');
CREATE VIEW v1 AS SELECT a, coalesce(b, 'default') AS b_default FROM t1 WHERE c > 2.0;
SELECT * FROM v1 JOIN t2 ON v1.a = t2.x WHERE t2.y LIKE 'test%' OR t2.z IS NULL;
